name: I have a pre-existing shoulder issue that flared up at work in Boise, does that count?
description: Yes, if work aggravated it—document with doctor.[2]

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing shoulder issue that flared up at work in Boise, does that count?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if work aggravated it—document with doctor.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, aggravation of pre-existing conditions is often compensable if work caused the flare-up.** Idaho and Utah cover occupational injuries worsening prior issues.[2][3] Key factors: Prove work link via doctor; report immediately (60 days Idaho). Tell physician details. Get medical evidence; insurers scrutinize these.
